lint.command: uv run ruff check shuvoice/ tests/

format.command: uv run ruff format --check shuvoice/ tests/
format.details: 12 files would be reformatted — all pre-existing (same as round 1). No formatting regressions from melotts milestone.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Pre-existing: dependency_errors() has extra venv_path parameter not in base class signature. Harmless since it has a default, but mismatches the abstract interface.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a warning to the backend-worker skill's 'Study Existing Patterns' step: when the backend uses a cross-venv subprocess (helper runs in a different Python venv), the invocation pattern differs from Piper (which uses a standalone binary). The helper must be invoked by absolute file path, not -m module, since the helper's package is not installed in the target venv. Reference .factory/library/architecture.md 'Cross-venv subprocess invocation' section.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature melotts-backend-and-helper: worker followed skill's 'Study tts_local.py' step, but the Piper pattern (binary in PATH) doesn't translate to cross-venv Python module invocation. Result: blocking bug caught in scrutiny round 1, fixed in melotts-scrutiny-fixes.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify backend-worker skill TDD procedure for verification-only features: when a feature's primary task is to verify and test pre-existing code (from a prior worker), strict red-green-refactor doesn't apply.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features melotts-config-registry and melotts-setup-automation both had workers who couldn't follow strict TDD because implementation was partially done by prior workers.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a note about the _complete_finish fallback path in wizard/__init__.py: when adding new TTS backends with backend-specific config keys, ensure the fallback write_config() call in _complete_finish() forwards those keys.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature melotts-wizard-integration: _complete_finish fallback at wizard/__init__.py:1407 doesn't forward tts_melotts_device.

rejectedObservations.observation: Cross-venv invocation pattern should be documented in architecture.md
